title: ochrosia fatuhivensis
intro: Ochrosia fatuhivensis, also known as the Fatush or Fatuhivensis tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia fatuhivensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ochrosia fatuhivensis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
